description: Remove unreachable response.ok check after fetchFromPage in npm-api.ts.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/npm && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Remove dead response.ok check after fetchFromPage in npm-api.ts
userStories.description: In plugins/npm/src/npm-api.ts, the api() function calls fetchFromPage then checks `if (!response.ok)` at around line 92 and includes auth cache clear and httpStatusToToolError. Since fetchFromPage auto-throws on non-ok and never returns a non-ok Response, this block is unreachable dead code. Remove it.
acceptanceCriteria: The `if (!response.ok)` block (including the clearAuthCache and httpStatusToToolError calls) is removed from npm-api.ts
The 204 handling and JSON parse that follow remain unchanged
